ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"other","Summary":"Script to extract original dining.html content from transcript.jsonl."}
CodeContent:
"import json

path = "/Users/pravinsam/.gemini/antigravity-ide/brain/353b6a43-7fa1-4a16-b18d-9ef0cd6ad7d2/.system_generated/logs/transcript.jsonl"
with open(path, "r") as f:
    for line in f:
        data = json.loads(line)
        content = data.get("content", "")
        # Check if the output of viewing dining.html is in this step
        if "dining.html" in str(data.get("tool_calls", "")) or "dining.html" in str(data.get("content", "")):
            # If the tool call was view_file on dining.html
            tool_calls = data.get("tool_calls", [])
            if isinstance(tool_calls, list):
                for tc in tool_calls:
                    if tc.get("name") == "view_file" and "dining.html" in str(tc.get("args", {})):
                        print(f"Found view_file tool call in Step {data.get('step_index')}")
            
            # If this is the output of view_file
            output = data.get("output", "")
            if "dining.html" in str(output) and "C Salt" in str(output):
                print(f"Found C Salt in Step {data.get('step_index')} output!")
                # Print size of output
                print(f"Output size: {len(output)}")
                # Save to file
                with open("extracted_dining_output.txt", "w") as out_f:
                    out_f.write(output)
"
Description: "Create a script to find and extract original dining.html content from transcript.jsonl"
